all.en: During my visit to Hanoi，I was determined to try as much local street food as possible.
all.zh: 在我造訪河內期間，我下定決心要嚐遍當地的街頭小吃。

all.en: The narrow streets of the Old Quarter were filled with delicious smells from food stalls.
all.zh: 老城區狹窄的街道上充滿了路邊攤飄來的美味香氣。

all.en: I sat down on a tiny plastic stool next to other locals enjoying their meals.
all.zh: 我在當地人享用餐點的小塑膠椅旁坐了下來。

all.en: My first dish was pho，a hot bowl of beef noodle soup with fresh herbs.
all.zh: 我的第一道菜是河粉，一碗熱騰騰的牛肉湯麵，配上新鮮香草。

all.en: The flavor was rich and complex，much better than any pho I had eaten before.
all.zh: 味道濃郁又有層次，比我以前吃過的任何河粉都美味。

all.en: Next，I tried banh mi，a crispy sandwich filled with pork and pickled vegetables.
all.zh: 接著，我嚐了越南法國麵包，那是一種夾著豬肉和醃菜的酥脆三明治。

all.en: A friendly vendor offered me a sweet Vietnamese coffee to balance the spicy flavors.
all.zh: 一位友善的攤販請我喝越式甜咖啡來平衡辛辣的口味。

all.en: I was a little worried about getting sick，but my stomach handled the food well.
all.zh: 我有點擔心會吃壞肚子，但我的腸胃很適應這些食物。

all.en: The vendors patiently taught me a few Vietnamese words while I waited for my food.
all.zh: 我等餐的時候，攤販還耐心地教我幾句越南話。

all.en: Eating street food gave me a real taste of Vietnamese culture and daily life.
all.zh: 吃街頭小吃讓我真正體會到了越南的文化與日常生活。

all.en: I returned to Taiwan with a notebook full of recipes I wanted to try at home.
all.zh: 我回到臺灣時，筆記本裡記滿了我想在家嘗試的食譜。

all.en: Back home, I cooked pho for my family using the recipe I had carefully written down.
all.zh: 回到家後，我按照仔細記下的食譜煮了河粉給家人吃。

all.en: They were impressed by the flavors and asked me to teach them step by step.
all.zh: 他們對味道讚不絕口，並請我一步步教他們。

all.en: I shared photos of my Hanoi adventure with my coworkers during lunch breaks.
all.zh: 午休時，我和同事分享了我在河內冒險的照片。

all.en: My best friend was inspired to plan her own food trip to Vietnam next summer.
all.zh: 我最好的朋友因此受到啟發，計畫明年夏天親自去越南美食之旅。

all.en: I started following Vietnamese chefs on social media to learn more authentic dishes.
all.zh: 我開始追蹤越南廚師的社群媒體，學習更多道地的料理。

all.en: Every Sunday, I challenge myself to make one new Vietnamese recipe at home.
all.zh: 每個星期天，我都會挑戰自己在家做一道新的越南料理。

all.en: My favorite so far is fresh spring rolls filled with shrimp and crunchy vegetables.
all.zh: 目前我最愛的是包著蝦子和爽脆蔬菜的越南春捲。

all.en: I even hosted a small Vietnamese-themed dinner party for my closest friends.
all.zh: 我甚至為最親近的朋友辦了一場小型的越南主題晚餐聚會。

all.en: They all said the food tasted amazing and made them want to travel together.
all.zh: 他們都說食物美味極了，讓他們也想一起出去旅行。

all.en: That trip not only filled my stomach but also sparked a lasting love for cooking.
all.zh: 那趟旅行不僅滿足了我的胃，也點燃了我對烹飪的長久熱愛。

all.en: My Vietnamese-themed dinner parties soon became a monthly tradition among my friends.
all.zh: 我的越南主題晚餐聚會很快成為朋友之間的每月傳統。

all.en: Each guest learned to roll fresh spring rolls and prepare a special dipping sauce.
all.zh: 每位賓客都學會了包越南春捲並調製特製的沾醬。

all.en: My neighbor lent me her grandmother's traditional Vietnamese tea set for the occasion.
all.zh: 我的鄰居把她奶奶的傳統越南茶具借給我，用於這場聚會。

all.en: I started exploring other Southeast Asian cuisines, including Thai and Malaysian dishes.
all.zh: 我開始探索其他東南亞料理，包括泰式和馬來西亞菜。

all.en: My cooking confidence grew, and I signed up for a weekend chef workshop in town.
all.zh: 我的烹飪信心增強，並報名了城裡的週末廚師工作坊。

all.en: The instructor praised the depth of flavor in my homemade pho broth.
all.zh: 老師稱讚我自製河粉湯頭的味道層次豐富。

all.en: I returned to Hanoi the next winter to learn directly from a famous street food chef.
all.zh: 我隔年冬天回到河內，直接跟一位知名的街頭小吃廚師學習。

all.en: He taught me the importance of patience and the secret behind a perfect broth.
all.zh: 他教我耐心的重要性，以及完美湯頭背後的祕訣。

all.en: I came home with twenty new recipes and a deeper respect for Vietnamese cooking.
all.zh: 我帶著二十道新食譜回家，也對越南料理有了更深的敬意。

all.en: Cooking now feels less like a hobby and more like a meaningful path of discovery.
all.zh: 如今烹飪對我而言不只是嗜好，更像是一條充滿意義的探索之路。
